external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes — 11 consecutive quiet polls. Architecture update date still 2026-04-04. V51.0 stable.

details: WIN-024: Fixed duplicated claim field (Cnossen 2016 text appeared twice, now just 'Roaring 40s = SAA boundary'). Cleaned duplicated detail_evidence paragraphs. Added detail_extra with Cnossen coupling acknowledgment at correct altitude gap framing.

WIN-031: Expanded from ~130 to ~280 words. Added Eliade axis mundi cross-cultural evidence (Hindu/Norse/Greek/Islamic/Zoroastrian), retrodiction vs prediction distinction, non-discriminating convergence argument, monitor.py absence. Updated verdict_text.

WIN-032: Expanded and differentiated from WIN-031. Named category error (future supernatural event as confirmed prediction), Revelation 21:2 exegesis (pole-axis is dome author's addition, not biblical), geopolitical framing from context.html, scorecard inflation (4 theological WINs), distinction from WIN-031. Added detail_extra.

ISS-467 / ISS-468 → EXP-012 (WIN-012): Self-Contradicted claim has spatial heterogeneity escape hatch not preempted. Also, 'two independent eclipses same ratio' argument fails because BOU 2017 is magnetic (nT), not gravity (µGal) — not the same quantity. Review never makes this explicit.

ISS-469 → EXP-013 (WIN-015): Meyl scalar wave review is 568 chars, critically underdeveloped. Missing Bruhn refutation, CUORE context, and proper near-field coupling explanation. Curmudgeon confirmed Cycle 1 recommendations still unimplemented.
